audit_items.proof_trace: All member variables are references or value types (no raw pointer members); the only pointer-typed parameters (`char* data`, `const char* data`) in `async_read_some`/`async_write_some` are passed to `boost::asio::buffer()` without being dereferenced within this file. No `->` or `*` dereference operator appears anywhere in the file, so the null-pointer-dereference property holds unconditionally.
